name: cmd_skill_creator
description: Create either local or system skill from command line program

prompts.name: base
prompts.description: Common interrogation methodology and output conventions

prompts.name: local
prompts.description: Local-tier scaffolding: manifest generation, gen script, build/test

prompts.name: system
prompts.description: System-tier scaffolding: manifest generation, gen script, C++ handlers, build/test

prompts.name: create_local_cli_skill
prompts.description: Given a CLI program name, scaffold a local-tier skill.json manifest

prompts.name: create_system_cli_skill
prompts.description: Given a CLI program name, scaffold a system-tier skill.json manifest with C++ handler
